question:
Will the price of XRP be between $2.80 and $2.90 on October 19?

Description: This market will resolve according to the final "Close" price of the Binance 1 minute candle for XRP/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

evidences.content: Analyst predictions of "$20-$30 for XRP's price is possible" suggest intermediate targets that could precede $50 levels if cross-border payment adoption reaches critical mass. evidences.content: She puts forward three price scenarios: a modest run to $5–$7 if Bitcoin’s momentum is modest; a base case of $10–$15 assuming ETF inflows and stronger use cases; and a blow-off rally that could push XRP past $20 if big institutional liquidity arrives.XRP Forecasts Split: $12.25 Target Vs. Modest Growth Outlook Meanwhile, Geoff Kendrick of Standard Chartered expects XRP’s rally to continue, saying the token could take on a larger role in international finance. He also points to future XRP ETFs as a catalyst that could draw more investors. Kendrick places his price target at $12.25 by 2029, which would mean a 300%+ jump from today’s $2.95 and translate into annualized returns of about 43%. evidences.title: XRP Fades Below $2.60 as $63M Whale Sales Hit Binance
evidences.content: ## Price Action Summary XRP traded a $0.11 band (4 %) from $2.54 to $2.66 between Oct 13 05:00 and Oct 14 04:00. Volume exploded to 244.6 M at 13:00 — nearly 3× the 91.8 M average — confirming aggressive dip-buying near $2.55. Price peaked at $2.66 during 20:00 hour before sustained sell-off drove a $2.55 close. Bears extended control into the final hour, breaking $2.57 support on 4 M volume at 04:10, then consolidating $2.55–$2.56 into close. ## Technical Analysis The $2.55–$2.56 zone continues to anchor near-term support after repeated high-volume defenses. Resistance is firm at $2.65–$2.66 where profit-taking and whale flows triggered multiple rejections.

evidences.title: XRP Prediction For 2025: What To Watch For This Year | October Edition
evidences.content: ## Analysts’ XRP Price Predictions for 2025 At this stage, XRP’s path forward looks far from linear. A variety of outcomes, both bullish and bearish, will hinge on how effectively Ripple can convert its partnerships, regulatory battles and technology upgrades into tangible adoption of XRP. While no single factor will likely make or break XRP’s prospects, the interplay between regulatory clarity, institutional usage and broader market cycles could propel the token in different directions. ### Bullish Possibilities ### Bearish Possibilities ### Consensus View [...] ### Market Trends As with most digital assets, XRP’s price is also influenced by broader economic and crypto market conditions. Factors like global interest rates, inflation and investor risk appetite often drive capital flows into and out of cryptocurrencies. Bull markets could accentuate any positive developments around XRP, while economic downturns or crypto-specific bear cycles may overshadow even the most promising Ripple initiatives. Keeping a close eye on macro signals is crucial for anyone looking to understand XRP’s price trajectory. ## Analysts’ XRP Price Predictions for 2025 [...] ### Bearish Possibilities ##...

evidences.title: XRP Liquidity Crisis: Binance's Trading Pools Experience Stunning ...
evidences.content: Binance shows a near-historic collapse in XRP liquidity: the 30-day XRP liquidity index on Binance is at multi‑year lows and reported trading volume fell from >$200 billion in January (last year) to near zero, producing thin order books, wider bid‑ask spreads and higher market impact costs. Key drivers and crypto risks: ongoing SEC v. Ripple regulatory uncertainty, market‑sentiment shifts and market‑maker pullback on this CEX; liquidity migration to DEXs/alternative platforms and reduced exchange depth raise execution and volatility risk. Market implication for traders and adoption: long‑term holders largely not selling (creates squeeze potential if buying returns) but low liquidity more likely to amplify price swings and trading costs, increasing short‑term downside and operational risk [...] ## XRP Liquidity Collapse: Analyzing the Data Cryptocurrency community influencer Arthur recently highlighted concerning data regarding XRP trading conditions. His analysis, reported by CryptoPotato, indicates the 30-day XRP liquidity index on Binance has reached near-historic lows. evidences.title: XRP Liquidity Dries Up: Futures Buy Volume On Binance Falls from $5.8B to $250M — TradingView News
evidences.content: According to a CryptoQuant report by Darkfost, the weakness in XRP is not an isolated event but part of a broader contraction across the altcoin market. Whether on spot markets or in derivatives, trading activity has been shrinking significantly over recent months. Liquidity is gradually drying up, signaling a clear retreat from speculative positioning as investors reduce exposure to higher-risk assets. This trend is especially visible in XRP’s derivatives data. The Taker Buy Volume on Binance, which tracks aggressive buy orders in futures markets, has collapsed to its lowest levels of the year. After peaking above $5.8 billion in July, this metric has fallen to roughly $250 million, representing a sharp 95.7% decline. XRP Ledger Taker Buy Volume on Binance | Source: CryptoQuant [...] Beyond sentiment, altcoins are facing a clear structural headwind. Bitcoin continues to absorb the majority of available capital, both in spot and derivatives markets. As BTC dominance remains elevated, liquidity that would normally rotate into altcoins during recoveries is instead staying concentrated in Bitcoin. This leaves very limited room for a sustained rebound across the broader altcoin mark...

evidences.title: Ripple News: SEC Targets October 25 for XRP ETF Decisions as Shutdown Nears End — TradingView News
evidences.content: ETF Deadlines Approach as SEC Halts Work Several asset managers have filed to launch or convert spot XRP ETFs, with deadlines falling between October 18 and October 25. These include filings from Grayscale, 21Shares, Bitwise, Canary Capital, WisdomTree, and CoinShares. Unlike funds registered under the Investment Company Act of 1940, these spot products are filed under the Securities Act of 1933, which requires direct SEC approval before trading can begin. That process is now stalled. A person close to the filings told Crypto America, “Issuers are likely trying to get 100% ready for when the SEC returns to normal so there are no delays and they can get to market as quickly as possible.” Can Approvals Still Happen on October 25? [...] Coinpedia Coinpedia # Ripple News: SEC Targets October 25 for XRP ETF Decisions as Shutdown Nears End The crypto market had high expectations for October 2025, a month expected to bring long-awaited decisions on spot ETFs for XRP, Solana, Cardano ADAUSD, and other major tokens. But instead of progress, the U.S. government entered a shutdown on October 1, which is now expected to last nearly 24 days. The shutdown has left the Securities and Exchange...

evidences.title: XRP SEC ETF approval October 2025: Make or break? Why October could be XRP’s biggest month yet - The Economic Times
evidences.content: AbcMedium AbcLarge Save Print Comment Synopsis October could mark a pivotal moment for XRP as the SEC prepares to decide on multiple spot XRP ETF applications during the weeks of October 13 and October 20. This decision may open new doors for XRP by allowing institutional inflows via ETFs, potentially boosting demand and reshaping the coin’s market dynamics. Make or break? Why October could be XRP’s biggest month yet XRP is trading around $3.05 in September 2025 ahead of critical SEC spot ETF rulings due mid-October. Approval could open fresh institutional inflows, boosting XRP demand and potentially igniting a gradual price rally through late 2025 and beyond. [...] ## Could October bring more volatility? History suggests volatility is almost guaranteed. Major regulatory announcements often spark strong moves in both directions. XRP could rally weeks before the decision as optimism builds. If approval comes, there may be a short-term selloff as traders lock in profits. If rejection comes, losses could accelerate before stabilizing. For long-term holders, October may be less about immediate price spikes and more about the signal it sends. Approval would confirm that XRP has cross...

evidences.title: How Will ETFs Affect XRP's Price?
evidences.content: October based on SEC deadlines. You have the ending of the case, the final sign-off from the judge between the SEC and Ripple. You know, again, I think it's a formality at this point, but institutions are waiting on that. You've got potential major partnership announcements from Ripple, maybe even R3 and a few others, including SBI, that I think could drive the price and demand. You've also got RLUSD, the stablecoin, creating additional utility for XRP. And again, most of that's been issued on Ethereum at this point, but I do think over the long term, Ripple wants XRP to be successful. It's the neutral bridge asset. They hold a ton of it in their treasury. So the more mainstream adoption we can get for these EVM sidechain on the XRPL and issuing more RLUSD there, they're [...] that momentum when it's moving, which creates additional buying pressure. So the supply shortage could force significant price discovery as sellers demand a premium on their XRP. So, if you're already in, you could be one of those sellers that's demanding a premium on their XRP when all of this transpires. Okay? So, with all of these catalysts, you got ETF approval coinciding with major bank partnerships a...

evidences.title: Full List of XRP ETF Filings: New Dates, Deadlines, and More
evidences.content: ### What Are Experts Saying About It? Eric Balchunas, a Bloomberg expert, has expressed his enthusiasm regarding the ETFs multiple times since the beginning of October. As the applications neared their deadlines, the US government shutdown caused a pause in approval. Reacting to this, Blachunas said, “From what I hear, everything is on ice… It’s like a rain delay. Bad time, but what are you gonna do.” ##### Never Miss a Beat in the Crypto World! Stay ahead with breaking news, expert analysis, and real-time updates on the latest trends in Bitcoin, altcoins, DeFi, NFTs, and more. ## FAQs Multiple spot XRP ETF applications from firms like Grayscale and WisdomTree have final deadlines in late October 2025, but approvals are delayed due to the US government shutdown.
